arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals true feelings on Tony Pulis comments as Arsenal dubbed 'the new Stoke'
arts.sum: Former Tottenham and Manchester United forward Dimitar Berbatov compared Arsenal to Stoke City after they scored twice from corners against the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sets Arsenal lofty new target after mastering set-pieces - 'Kings of everything!'
arts.sum: Arsenal have turned into the set-piece kings of the Premier League, but that is not enough for their manager Mikel Arteta who wants them to dominate on all fronts

arts.ttl: Arsenal face Liverpool competition to sign perfect £65m star to unleash Martin Odegaard
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will demand roughly £65m if they are to sell Xavi Simons next summer - with Arsenal one of several Premier League sides linked with a move for the Netherlands international. However, reports from The Athletic indicate that Simons could make a permanent transfer away from the Parc des Princes next summer as it is said there is "no indication of him looking to sign a new deal" and, therefore, could lead PSG to sanctioning a sale.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's 'most annoying bloke in football' set to extend Gunners contract
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal coaching staff are in negotiations to extend their contracts with set-piece specialist Nicolas Jover among them after making a strong impression in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names one thing Arsenal must do to beat Liverpool to Premier League title
arts.sum: Alan Shearer reckons that Arsenal have a good chance of winning the Premier League title this season - if Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka stay fit - although he still believes Liverpool are firmly in pole position. "Liverpool are red-hot favourites to win the title at this moment in time - and rightly so - but I think Arsenal will have a lot to say about it.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta delivers update on Gabriel and Riccardo Calafiori ahead of Arsenal vs Fulham
arts.sum: The pair were not involved in full training on Friday, but are understood to have done individual work at London Colney. Speaking after the game Arteta implied that they had a decent chance of being involved at Craven Cottage on Sunday though.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Gabriel fitness, Stoke comparisons and Emile Smith Rowe
arts.sum: The Spaniard fielded questions on Arsenal's superb set-piece record after the Gunners scored two more goals from corners to beat Manchester United in midweek. He showed again in big matches what he can deliver and the spirit that he brings to the team, the quality that he has to play in the best possible way.

arts.ttl: Arsenal VAR anger goes on but there's a certain karma for Newcastle
arts.sum: Yet it was perhaps not the goals or even when they went in that provided the biggest frustration that has certainly bled over to the Arsenal fans who watched well after the full-time whistle. It was aggressive, it was unnecessary and it was endangering to the player and certainly worthy of not only a penalty – as it took place in the box – but it was serious foul play and red card worthy too.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's elite mentality shines through to put Arsenal on path to glory
arts.sum: It was in response to a question about being the set-piece kings, after scoring twice from corners against Manchester United to take their set-piece goals tally to six for the season. Nicolas Jover has been lauded for his work as the Gunners' set-piece coach and he has made them extremely hard to defend against when it comes to corners and free-kicks around the 18-yard box.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal quoted £50m for 'strong' Champions League midfielder likened to Bruno Guimaraes
arts.sum: Arsenal are enjoying a bright campaign and, with the January transfer window on the horizon, they could well look to bring in some mid-season reinforcements....
